rationale: The page provides a concise historical fact regarding the shift of the Awadh capital to Lucknow in 1775, which is a significant event in the cultural history of the region.
cleanedText:
Lucknow Becomes Capital
1775: A Transformative Year
Nawab Asaf-ud-Daula (1775 to 1797) moved the capital of Awadh from Faizabad to Lucknow in 1775. This decision marked the beginning of a cultural revival in the city.
